mapper.select:
SELECT t1.id as id, t1.task_code as taskCode, t1.required_completion_time as requiredCompletionTime, t1.state as state, t1.verifyer as verifyer, t2.count_price as cost, t4.sample_name as sampleName FROM test_task as t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info as t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel as t3 ON t3.entrustment_id = t1.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample as t4 ON t4.id = t3.sample_id WHERE 1=1
and t1.task_code like CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')
-- and t1.state =7 group by t1.id,t4.product_id
SELECT id,task_code,verifyer,verify_time FROM test_task WHERE id =#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE test_task set verifyer=#{verifyer},verify_time = #{verifyTime} WHERE id =#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t2.name FROM sys_user as t1 LEFT JOIN sys_ding_user as t2 ON t1.ding_user_id = t2.userid WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId}
